name: ergo-agent-mcp
description: Lets MCP-compatible AI agents (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, …) hold ERG, check Note boxes on the Ergo blockchain, build payment transactions, and offer paywalled tools that gate execution behind a real on-chain Note. Built on the AgentPay v0 protocol from ergo-agent-economy.
author: bez111

ERGO_ADDRESS.description: Ergo address the agent operates from. Get one from any Ergo wallet (e.g. Nautilus). Testnet ERG free at https://testnet.ergofaucet.org.

ERGO_NETWORK.description: `testnet` (default) or `mainnet`. Mainnet writes are blocked until the audited ergoTree manifest is signed externally.

ERGO_NODE_URL.description: Override the default Ergo node URL.

tools.name: ergo_get_balance
tools.description: Get the confirmed ERG balance for the agent address (or any other address).

tools.name: ergo_get_height
tools.description: Get the current Ergo blockchain height.

tools.name: ergo_get_utxos
tools.description: List unspent UTxOs (boxes) for an address.

tools.name: ergo_check_note
tools.description: Inspect a Note box: value, expiry, task hash, reserve reference; report whether the Note is expired.

tools.name: ergo_build_payment
tools.description: Build an unsigned EIP-12 payment transaction from the agent's UTxOs.

tools.name: ergo_submit_transaction
tools.description: Submit a signed EIP-12 transaction to the Ergo network.

tools.name: ergo_task_hash
tools.description: Compute the BLAKE2b-256 hash of a task output for use as a Note acceptance predicate.

tools.name: ergo_create_reserve
tools.description: Build an unsigned transaction that creates a Reserve collateral box.

tools.name: ergo_issue_note
tools.description: Build an unsigned transaction that issues a Note backed by an existing Reserve.

tools.name: ergo_redeem_note
tools.description: Build an unsigned transaction that redeems a Note (releases its ERG to the receiver).

tools.name: ergo_deploy_tracker
tools.description: Build an unsigned transaction that deploys a Tracker (anti-double-spend registry).

tools.name: ergo_settle_batch
tools.description: Build an unsigned transaction that redeems multiple Notes at once.

examples.title: Build a payment
examples.user: Build a payment of 0.001 ERG to 9f4QF8AD…

examples.title: Compute a task hash
examples.user: Hash 'the answer is 42' for use as a Note predicate
